summary: Tested all guest user flows on pillar pages. All flows now work WITHOUT requiring login. Fixed 2 backend issues: 1) ExperienceRSVP model pet_id made optional, 2) Farewell endpoint updated to support guest users with optional auth.

fit_page_guest_flow.details: Guest can open modal, enter pet details (name, breed, weight, age), fill contact details (name, phone, email), select fitness goal, and submit request. Success toast shown with request ID.

enjoy_page_guest_rsvp.details: Guest can RSVP with pet name, breed, and contact details. Success toast: 'RSVP Submitted! 🎉'

learn_page_guest_training_request.details: Guest can request training with pet details and contact info. Success toast: '🎓 Training Request Submitted!'

learn_page_guest_enroll.details: Guest can enroll in program with pet name and contact. Success toast: '🎉 Enrollment Submitted!'

paperwork_page_add_to_cart.details: Add to Cart works for bundles. Cart drawer opens showing added item with price.

farewell_page_guest_service.details: Guest can request service with pet name and contact. Success toast: '💜 Request Submitted'

guest_contact_fields_visible.details: All pages show guest contact fields (Name, Phone, Email) when not logged in

submit_buttons_enabled.details: Submit buttons are enabled when guest pet name is provided

updated_files: /app/backend/enjoy_routes.py - Made pet_id Optional in ExperienceRSVP model
/app/backend/server.py - Updated farewell endpoint to use get_current_user_optional for guest support
context_for_next_testing_agent: All guest user flows are working. Backend fixes applied: 1) enjoy_routes.py - pet_id made Optional, 2) server.py - farewell endpoint uses optional auth. All pillar pages (Fit, Enjoy, Learn, Paperwork, Farewell) now support guest users without login.
